[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011011101 6
1 0111101010 6
2 1111001000 5
3 1010011100 5
4 0111100000 4
5 1011100011 6
6 1001001001 4
7 0011011101 6

01 10 1110110001 6
12 21 1100000011 4
23 32 0010101010 4
34 43 1010010100 4
45 54 0100110111 6
56 65 1000100010 3
67 76 1100000101 4
70 07 1010011100 5 match 3

02 20 0010110010 4
13 31 1110101001 6
24 42 1000111110 6
35 53 1110100011 6
46 64 1100010101 5
57 75 0100100111 5
60 06 0110011001 5
71 17 0100101101 5

47 74 0000010000 1
50 05 1110111011 8
61 16 1000101000 3
72 27 1000101110 5

37 73 1010000100 3
